purpose: Apply cross-paper tools, CAM memory, and ordinary standard formalism before classifying claims as residual.

temporal_back_application_rule.purpose: Preserve places where a paper is locally honest at its stage but later papers may return with additional tools, facts, receipts, or mathematical structure that refine the earlier claim.
temporal_back_application_rule.delta_format: local claim at paper time -> later attached fact/tool/receipt -> revised representation -> remaining invariant boundary

inferences.name: no_cost_leech_lookup_operational_closure
inferences.route: Existing lattice code chain plus E8/Niemeier/Leech lookup machinery closes the operational lookup surface.
inferences.residue: Expanded invariants, Gamma72, and nontrivial glue witnesses.

inferences.name: symbolic_vs_physical_carrier_split
inferences.route: Symbolic addressable carrier claims can close internally; physical carrier identity requires Hamiltonian, units, and measurement.
inferences.residue: External calibration and measured physical identity.

inferences.name: electron_hole_exciton_accounting
inferences.route: Standard hole, exciton, recombination, screening, band-gap, and effective-mass formalism explains much of the vacancy/complement vocabulary.
inferences.residue: CQE addressability, obligation bookkeeping, and non-semiconductor symbolic correction machinery.

inferences.name: spinor_double_cover_local_closure
inferences.route: Standard SU(2)->SO(3) double-cover behavior plus local O8 receipt closes finite-frame spinor semantics.

inferences.name: finite_ca_and_bounded_search_promotion
inferences.route: Finite state space plus explicit transition or coverage verifier is enough for finite claims.
inferences.residue: Unbounded Rule 30/P3, game-theoretic completeness, and superpermutation minimality.

inferences.name: formal_methods_paper_form_closure
inferences.route: Claim envelopes, content-addressed receipts, lane grants, and causal graphs are formal-methods closures.
inferences.residue: Missing hashes, absent graph rows, or unrun standards reports.

inferences.name: applied_forge_internal_external_split
inferences.route: Forge validators close representation/generation kernels; external domain validation remains benchmark/data work.
inferences.residue: Materials measurements, PDB/native structure parsing, product telemetry, playability/game theory.

inferences.name: standard_model_transport_split
inferences.route: SU(3)/D12/J3 face transport closes as structural algebra; CKM requires attached measured data.

inferences.name: finite_voa_moonshine_split
inferences.route: Finite VOA sector and centroid chains close locally; full Moonshine identification remains theorem-bound.

inferences.name: continuum_as_numerical_analysis
inferences.route: Continuum, interpolation, and between-sample dynamics require sampling rules, norms, and error bounds.
inferences.residue: Unspecified physical dynamics and global continuum claims.
